LanguageData.VQE_PrototypeARC.questDescriptionRules.r: questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has informed us of an old research and construction site where Lee Moldaver once worked on a prototype grid-scale reactor. The site appears abandoned, isolated, and surrounded by the ruins of a project that was never finished. There should still be an operational terminal containing Moldaver's research notes, engineering logs, and prototype schematics. Exploring the site may yield advanced components, reactor data, and salvage that could help us continue the work. The trip will be long and dangerous, but the potential reward is enormous.

questDescription(askerIsNull==True)->We have discovered an old research and construction site where Lee Moldaver was working on a prototype grid-scale reactor. The location lies in a remote area surrounded by the ruins of an unfinished project. An operational terminal may still contain Moldaver's notes, engineering records, and reactor schematics. Exploring the site could yield rare components, prototype hardware, and the data needed to continue her work. The expedition will be demanding, but the payoff could change the future of our colony's power supply.
LanguageData.VQE_AbandonedARC.questDescriptionRules.r: questDescription->According to the data extracted from Moldaver's old prototype site, we have located an abandoned industrial complex where work on her restoration reactor continued. The facility once held engineers, power technicians, and fabrication crews pushing the project toward a grid-ready prototype, but now it stands silent and broken. The site contains [siteDetails], but it is now [siteThreat]. [studyWarning] [questFailWarning] Successfully completing this expedition [questOutcome].

questDescription->Data from the prototype site revealed the coordinates of an abandoned industrial yard where Lee Moldaver and her team expanded the restoration reactor project. Rusted frames, collapsed gantries, and half-finished housings still mark the place where the work stalled. Within the complex are [siteDetails], but [siteThreat] must be dealt with before any meaningful research can be done. [studyWarning] [questFailWarning] Resolving this task [questOutcome].

questDescription->Analyzing the prototype data has pinpointed a construction yard that served as the next stage of Moldaver's reactor network. What was once a major industrial build site is now a graveyard of cranes, housings, and unfinished power infrastructure left to rot in the open. Inside, you'll find [siteDetails], but it is [siteThreat]. [studyWarning] [questFailWarning] Your efforts here [questOutcome].

questDescription->The data retrieved from the old prototype has led us to an industrial complex that once played a key role in advancing Moldaver's restoration reactor. The place is ruined now, but its machine halls and service yards still contain evidence of how close the project came to completion. Among the remnants are [siteDetails], though the complex has become [siteThreat]. [studyWarning] [questFailWarning] Completing this mission [questOutcome].
questOutcome->could lead us to Moldaver's final reactor site.
questOutcome->may uncover the true restoration reactor site.
questOutcome->might point us to Moldaver's final project.
questOutcome->should reveal the next steps needed to find the restoration reactor.
questOutcome->will bring us closer to uncovering Moldaver's reactor secrets.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARC.questDescriptionRules.rul: questDescription->You have [discoveryDesc] of a [adj] village where one of Lee Moldaver's late-stage reactor prototypes was built. The villagers [villagerBehavior], and the site [villageCondition]. [arcDetails] However, [villagerWarnings]. If [trigger], the villagers will [villagerReaction]. [finalWarning]
LanguageData.VQE_InventorShelter.questDescriptionRule: questDescription->[dataDiscovery] revealed the location of a [adj] underground [structureType] where Lee Moldaver rests in cryptosleep. The journey will be grueling, as the site is afflicted by a[coldSnapDesc], pushing the entire region into lethal temperatures. Inside the bunker, a few [turretDefense] still guard the interior, powered by an ancient [arcName]. The reactor cannot be studied here but can be broken down for [arcComponents]. Your primary task is to reach the casket and release Moldaver. Prepare carefully for the extreme cold or risk severe [hypothermiaDanger].

questDescription->Recovered data points us to a [adj] bunker buried beneath a region suffering from a[coldSnapDesc]. It is here that Lee Moldaver, the engineer behind the restoration reactor project, lies sealed in cryptosleep. The area's temperatures are falling to dangerous lows, creating an immediate risk of [hypothermiaDanger] during your approach. Inside, [turretDefense] remain active, powered by an overgrown [arcName]. The reactor can be deconstructed for [arcComponents], but the real prize is freeing Moldaver and bringing her back to your colony.

questDescription->We've identified the location of a [adj] [structureType] where Lee Moldaver has been preserved in a cryptosleep casket. The area surrounding the site is cursed with a[coldSnapDesc], dropping temperatures to deadly extremes. The bunker itself houses a few [turretDefense], powered by an overgrown [arcName]. While the reactor cannot be studied, it can be salvaged for [arcComponents]. Be ready for freezing conditions and hypothermia as you attempt to retrieve Moldaver alive.
LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.questDescriptionRules.rulesS: questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has sent us a message. A group of [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] has occupied one of Lee Moldaver's abandoned reactor sites. The camp is under the control of [siteFaction_name]. [asker_nameDef] wants us to clear the area by eliminating all enemies and defenses. Once the site is secured, we will be able to study the reactor hardware and recover valuable fusion components. [asker_label] also says that [sitePart0_description].

questDescription(askerIsNull==true)->We have received information that one of Moldaver's old reactor sites has been taken over by [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] from [siteFaction_name]. The bandits have fortified their position and are using the location as a hideout. Securing the site will let us examine the reactor for remaining research data and salvageable fusion components. Be prepared for resistance, as the site is likely heavily guarded. Additionally, [sitePart0_description].
sitePart0_description->the reactor frame is visibly damaged but still holds valuable salvage
sitePart0_description->the bandits are using the remaining reactor equipment to power their crude operations
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearArcSite.questDescriptionRules: questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has sent us a message. A group of [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] has taken control of an abandoned nuclear reactor test site. The camp is currently under the control of [siteFaction_name]. [asker_nameDef] is requesting that we clear out the area by eliminating all enemies and defenses. Once the site is secured, we will have the opportunity to study the damaged reactor and recover valuable fusion components. [asker_label] also mentions that [sitePart0_description]. [sitePart1_description]

questDescription(askerIsNull==true)->We have received intelligence that an abandoned nuclear reactor test site has been overtaken by [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] from [siteFaction_name]. The bandits have fortified their position and are using the location as a hideout. Securing the site will allow us to examine the damaged reactor for any remaining research data and salvageable fusion components. Be prepared for resistance, as the bandits have likely set up significant defenses. Additionally, [sitePart0_description]. [sitePart1_description]
sitePart0_description->the bandits are using the reactor husk to power their crude machinery and weapons
sitePart1_description->Toxic fallout from the site's damaged reactor has poisoned the area, presenting a significant environmental danger
sitePart1_description->Hazardous fallout clouds the area, a grim reminder of how unstable the test reactor became
LanguageData.VQE_GeothermalArcSite.questDescriptionRu: questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has sent us a message. A group of [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] has taken control of an abandoned geothermal reactor site. The camp is under the control of [siteFaction_name]. [asker_nameDef] is requesting that we clear out the area by eliminating all enemies and defenses. Securing the site will allow us to study the geothermal reactor and recover valuable components for future use. Additionally, [sitePart0_description].

questDescription(askerIsNull==true)->We have received information that an old geothermal reactor site has been occupied by [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] from [siteFaction_name]. The bandits have fortified their position and are using the site to control the surrounding area. Securing the site will give us access to study the geothermal reactor and extract useful components. The site is likely well-defended, so prepare for resistance. Additionally, [sitePart0_description].
sitePart0_description->the geothermal reactor appears heavily worn but intact enough to salvage parts
sitePart0_description->the bandits seem to be utilizing the reactor equipment to power their operations
